    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    ActuatorHealthApplicationStatusProvider
    Leverages Spring Boot Actuator health endpoint to determine the current health of the application.
    ApplicationStatusProvider
    Provides the current health of the application represented in Consul's Check.CheckStatus so that it can then be sent to Consul TTL checks.
    CatalogService
     
    Check
     
    Check.CheckStatus
     
    ConditionalOnConsulDiscoveryEnabled
    Provides a more succinct conditional spring.cloud.consul.discovery.enabled.
    ConditionalOnConsulEnabled
    When both property and consul classes are on the classpath.

    ConsulConfigProperties
     
    ConsulConfigProperties.Format
    There are many ways in which we can specify configuration in consul i.e., Nested key value style: Where value is either a constant or part of the key (nested).
    ConsulConfigProperties.Watch
    Consul watch properties.
    ConsulConfigServerAutoConfiguration
    Extra configuration for config server if it happens to be registered with Consul.

    Configuration properties for ConsulHealthIndicator.
    ConsulHeartbeatAutoConfiguration
    Auto configuration for the heartbeat.
    ConsulInboundMessageProducer
    Adapter that receives Messages from Consul Events, converts them into Spring Integration Messages, and sends the results to a Message Channel.
